name: ludikids-software
description: Sistema de gestão de creche LudiKids - PWA + API

scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: pnpm --filter api exec prisma db seed
scripts.verify: pnpm --filter web lint && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter api lint && pnpm --filter api test -- --runInBand --verbose src/billing/billing.service.spec.ts && pnpm --filter api build
